description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The grooves are deep and dark, contrasting with the slightly marbled, bluish-gray stone surface. The block has sharp, clean edges and a uniform thickness, giving it a modern, manufactured appearance. The sides are solid and unadorned, with a consistent dark coloration. The overall finish is smooth but not glossy, suggesting a polished stone material. This type of block is often used as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments, such as on sidewalks or in plazas.
description: A rectangular, grooved stone block with a marbled bluish-gray surface and deep, parallel grooves across the top. The finish is smooth and the sides are solid and dark.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat face and the depth of the parallel grooves on the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the grooves and the uniform thickness of the block.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the grooves and the solid, dark side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the length and spacing of the grooves.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or decorative obstacle
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
